display_text: Gossamer Cape, Cost: 0: Neutral item providing Sixth Sense passive ability (automatically dodges an attack from an enemy hero). Grants no movement speed or other attributes. Functions as a single-use evasion tool against hero attacks. Stats: CD: 6s.
